summary: Tooling-only PR that changed the wibo selection predicate in tools/project.py: use_wibo now requires sys.platform == "linux" instead of allowing both Linux and Darwin. The PR title says "Move mac to wine", but the loaded evidence only directly proves removal of Darwin/macOS from the wibo path.

key_files.role: Changed ProjectConfig.use_wibo platform gate for compiler wrapper selection.

what_changed.text: In tools/project.py, ProjectConfig.use_wibo stopped accepting sys.platform == "darwin" and now only accepts sys.platform == "linux", while retaining checks for wibo_tag, supported machine architectures, and absence of an explicit wrapper.

smart_moves.text: The change is narrowly scoped to a single platform predicate in the tooling wrapper path, minimizing unrelated project churn.
evidence_refs: changed_files: one changed file, one hunk, one added line, one deleted line
raw_diff: only use_wibo platform condition changed

review_feedback.text: Automated GALE01 report said "No changes", indicating the tooling predicate edit did not alter the reported game output in that bot run.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev[bot] issue_comment `### Report for GALE01 ... No changes`

review_feedback.text: The PR received approvals from ribbanya and jurrejelle; no loaded review comments explain additional rationale.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: review by ribbanya state APPROVED
text_corpus: review by jurrejelle state APPROVED

notes: The exact code change is strongly evidenced by the full raw diff.
The PR body is empty and there are no review comments, so the rationale behind "Move mac to wine" is only partially evidenced by the title plus the Darwin removal.
No decomp source, matching, naming, assembly, or objdiff tactics were involved in the loaded PR slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: use_wibo became Linux-only in tools/project.py
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2418 changed ProjectConfig.use_wibo so wibo is selected only on sys.platform == "linux" rather than on Linux or Darwin. This was a one-line tooling predicate change with a GALE01 bot report of "No changes" and two approval reviews.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: approvals by ribbanya and jurrejelle

source_update_candidates.title: tools/project.py use_wibo platform gate
source_update_candidates.text: As of PR 2418, tools/project.py's use_wibo predicate allows wibo only when sys.platform == "linux"; Darwin/macOS is no longer accepted by this predicate.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed Darwin from use_wibo platform condition
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a concrete tooling path fact supported by the PR diff, but it should be curated as source/path metadata rather than treated as a global decomp standard.

rejection_notes: Do not infer from this slice alone that all macOS compiler execution must use Wine; the title suggests that direction, but the only loaded code evidence is removal of Darwin from the wibo predicate.
Do not record decomp matching or assembly lessons from this PR; it changed only tooling configuration.
